entries.title: Admin dashboard rendered through WelcomeTourDashboard.
entries.notes: Capture after installing only the core Capell stack and capell-app/welcome-tour, with capell-app/login-audit and its direct authentication-log dependency removed from the disposable harness.
entries.useCase: A first-time administrator lands on the dashboard replacement that can launch onboarding.

entries.title: Welcome tour overlay showing the first configured onboarding step.
entries.notes: Use an admin account that has not dismissed the tour.
entries.useCase: A first-time administrator sees the first configured tour step overlay.

entries.title: Welcome tour settings group with enabled toggle and step repeater.
entries.notes: Open the Welcome Tour package settings page after publishing and running the package settings migration.
entries.useCase: A site owner configures the enabled state and tour step repeater from the package settings page.

entries.title: User edit form with Show welcome tour toggle.
entries.notes: Requires a users table with the dismissed_hints column so the bridge contributes the field.
entries.useCase: An administrator toggles whether a user should see the welcome tour again from the user edit form.
